docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANUNICIATION, DANTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2009 BY PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED PLAINTIFF.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, ELISA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM, DAVID HUARD FILED BY NAVARRO, ELISA ANUNICIATION, DANTE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, ELISA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY NAVARRO, ELISA AS TO DEFENDANT ANUNICIATION, DANTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, ELISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANUNICIATION, DANTE *PLAINTIFF AGREED THAT SHE OWES DEFENDANT, AS HER LANDLORD, AN AMOUNT THAT EXCEEDS WHAT DEFENDANT AGREED HE BORROWED. THE AMOUNTS ARE OFFSET IN DEFENDANT'S FAVOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
